explanation: Insertion: Added quotes around the .rdp file path to avoid triggering the 'CommandLine|endswith: .rdp' detection by ensuring the .rdp extension is not directly at the end of the command line.
Substitution: Replaced the default command-line argument with a long option (-v) to obscure the .rdp file path and avoid the 'CommandLine|endswith: .rdp' detection.
Reordering: Placed the -f flag after the .rdp file path to change the structure of the command line, potentially avoiding the 'CommandLine|endswith: .rdp' detection.
